error_signature: columns with data appear before empty columns
title: Column order issue when exporting from Google Sheets
symptom: When exporting data from Google Sheets using n8n, the columns with data appear before the empty columns, disrupting the intended order.
applies_when: Exporting data to CSV or Excel
not_this_if: Data is exported directly from Google Sheets web app
root_cause: The Google Sheets node in n8n may not accurately reflect the order of columns as they appear in the Google Sheets interface. Instead, it processes the data in a way that prioritizes columns with data, leading to a rearrangement of the intended column order.
fix_steps: Add a new Google Sheets node to read the newly created sheet with the appended data.
Ensure this node outputs the data in the correct order as it appears in the Google Sheets file.
Add a code node to remove any unwanted columns (e.g., 'row_number') and fix number formatting issues.
agent_instruction: Add a new Google Sheets node to read the appended data and adjust the output order.
